title: What the Rise and Fall Lens Is
body:
This lens treats civilisations as systems with life cycles rather than as static achievements. Growth, consolidation, expansion, and decay all become visible stages instead of isolated events.

The advantage is clarity: you can compare different civilisations without flattening them into the same story.
keyPoints: Peak strength can hide future weakness
furtherReading: Oswald Spengler, 'The Decline of the West'
